source.name: Dallas-Fort Worth event source registry
source.attribution: Official source pages and configured public event feeds

events.title: CJ Starr - FREE with a reservation
Open Mic Night
events.description: Every Thursday, 6:30-9:30, we’re hosting Open Mic Night. All are welcome. Singers, Songwriters, Musicians of all kinds. Come jam with us in the Beer Hall (or Mezzanine inside if the Beer Hall is occupied!).

events.title: TUPPS Run Club
events.description: Not just miles. Something to look forward to every week! 🏃 1 or 3 mile routes (all paces welcome) 🐶 dogs welcome 🎤 open mic / live music after 🕡 Thursdays • 6:30 PM 📍 Meet on the North Grain Patio Run it. Earn it. 🍻 No sign-up. No pressure. Just show up and run. Bring a friend. First run is always the best one.

events.title: Trivia Night
events.description: Free to play! Prizes for 1st, 2nd, and 3rd place. Hosted by Dallas Trivia Guy on the first and third Thursdays of the month.

events.title: Stars, Stripes, & Sips: Fireworks at TUPPS
events.description: Bring the whole crew and come party with us to kick off 4th of July Weekend! We’re open for lunch with soccer on all day, then we’ll have live music starting at 7:30 and fireworks popping off of The Grain Room at 9:30 PM! Our Kid’s Splash Zone will open for the weekend at 11 AM – waterslide, mini pools, water balls, frisbees, and more. $10, all you can play,

events.title: Grand Prairie Lone Star Stars & Stripes 2026: July 3rd Racing & Fireworks
events.description: Lone Star Park in Grand Prairie hosts its Stars & Stripes Fireworks Festival on July 3rd with live thoroughbred racing, family fun and a spectacular 20-minute fireworks show after the final race. Gates open at 3 p.m. with the first race at 4:45 p.m.—a unique July 4th-weekend family outing.

events.title: Addison Kaboom Town! 2026: Top-Rated July 3rd Fireworks Near Dallas
events.description: Kaboom Town! is consistently ranked one of the nation's top fireworks displays, drawing huge crowds to Addison Circle Park just north of Dallas. The July 3rd celebration features a vintage warbird airshow, live music, food vendors and a 30-minute fireworks finale at 9:30 p.m. A festive, family-friendly kickoff to the July 4th weekend.

events.title: Baby Dee Birthday Bash
events.description: Baby Dee Birthday Bash Fri Jul 3 Doors at 7:00PM / Show at 8:00PM at Club Dada Hip Hop/Rap

events.title: Denton Yankee Doodle Parade 2026: Free July 4th Downtown Parade
events.description: Denton's beloved Yankee Doodle Parade rolls through the historic Downtown Square at 9 a.m. on July 4th, celebrating America's 250th birthday. This free, family-friendly hometown tradition is the perfect morning kickoff before evening fireworks.

events.title: Grand Prairie Lone Star Stars & Stripes 2026: July 4th Racing & Fireworks
events.description: Lone Star Park in Grand Prairie celebrates Independence Day on July 4th with its Stars & Stripes Fireworks Festival, pairing live thoroughbred racing and family fun with a spectacular 20-minute fireworks show after the final race. Gates open at 3 p.m. and the first race is at 4:45 p.m.

events.title: Fort Worth's Fourth
events.description: Fort Worth's largest Fourth of July celebration: festival food, cold drinks, kids' activities, live music, and fireworks along the Trinity River at Panther Island Pavilion. Gates open 5:00pm, fireworks at 9:30pm.

events.title: Frisco Freedom Fest 2026: Free July 4th Block Party & Fireworks
events.description: Frisco's free, family-oriented Freedom Fest Block Party returns July 4th at Riders Field with live music, food and local vendors from 5 to 10 p.m. The Opening Ceremony begins at 6 p.m., and a spectacular fireworks show lights up the sky around 10 p.m. An all-ages Independence Day celebration.

events.title: Denton July 4th Fireworks 2026 at North Texas Fairgrounds
events.description: Cap off July 4th in Denton with the Noon Kiwanis Club fireworks show at the North Texas Fairgrounds. Gates open at 6 p.m. with live music at 7 p.m. and a dazzling fireworks finale at 9:30 p.m. Free to enter, with $10 parking per car—a great family night out.

events.title: Plano's All-American 4th 2026: Free July 4th Fireworks at Oak Point Park
events.description: Plano's free All-American 4th lights up Oak Point Park on July 4th with food trucks, family games and live entertainment starting at 6 p.m. The night ends with a spectacular fireworks show at 9:30 p.m.—a festive, family-friendly Independence Day celebration.
events.venue: Oak Point Park Special Events Field

events.title: DCC's Storytelling Club Team Presents: Stories That Go Boom!
Lucy Fulls' Level 2 Storytelling Grad Show
Light Up Arlington 2026: July 5th Fireworks & Drone Show Downtown
events.description: Light Up Arlington returns to Downtown Arlington on Sunday, July 5, 2026 with an expanded fireworks and drone show celebrating Independence Day, Arlington's 150th anniversary and America's 250th birthday. This family celebration features live music, food and family fun, capped by a fireworks finale at about 9:50 p.m.

events.title: Plant Bingo at Lakewood Brewing!
events.description: Join us for a cozy night of bingo, plants, and good vibes! Drinks and food available for purchase on site from the Lakewood Brewing bar and kitchen. Everyone is guaranteed to go home with a plant! Date and Time: July 9th, 6:30-8:30pm Where: Lakewood Brewing Company 10+ Prize plants per event Tickets available on our website or below!
